items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of smooth nappa leather and patent calfskin with suede lining, the leather gets better with time!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing, full of retro and chic vibes!
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn on the shoulder, carried by hand, or crossbody; three styles to switch between! The handbag style is professional for commuting, while the crossbody gives a casual, relaxed look. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Small model number 89356 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box and gift bag included)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, the calfskin is soft, smooth, and premium. The leather develops a beautiful patina over time!
Classic silhouette, iconic Anagram embossing, and a perfect blend of vintage and modern vibes.
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn crossbody, handheld, or shoulder; three ways to switch freely! The handheld look is professional for work, while crossbody gives a relaxed casual feel. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Item No. 89352 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box, gift bag)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, it feels soft and luxurious!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing and retro briefcase shape.
The large size looks cool and is perfect for shoulder carry.
Magnetic closure inside with a large capacity!
Three carrying styles: Handbag, Shoulder, and Crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a natural, French "laid-back" vibe!
Large model number 89353
Dimensions 34.5*27*14 (gift bag included)

items.name_cn:
ꫛꫀꪝ
Fold Shopper is really amazing~
Latest runway shopping bag/mom bag
Shape: The silhouette is super great, natural and lazy yet unique
Paper grain cowhide: Lightweight and comfortable to wear, folds flat at the bottom, travel essential
Long/Short shoulder strap: Flexible switching, looks great as a shoulder bag or handbag, suitable for daily commute, short trips, business trips
Works as a mom bag too, very stylish and practical! Go for it!
size:50*20*31cm
